quiz.question: SQL injection is best prevented by…
quiz.explanation: Never concatenate untrusted input into SQL.

quiz.question: XSS attacks inject…
options: Malicious scripts into pages viewed by others
quiz.explanation: Escape/encode output; use CSP; sanitize HTML carefully.

quiz.question: CSRF protection for cookie sessions often uses…
quiz.explanation: Browser sends cookies automatically; CSRF tokens / SameSite mitigate.

quiz.question: Principle of least privilege means…
options: Grant only the minimum permissions needed
Share one DB user for all apps
Disable auth in staging copies of prod data
quiz.explanation: Limit blast radius of compromised credentials.

quiz.question: Store passwords using…
quiz.explanation: One-way slow hashes with unique salts; never reversible “encryption” for passwords.

quiz.question: OAuth2/JWT without HTTPS is…
options: Required by JWT spec to skip TLS

quiz.question: Prefer RS256/JWKS over HS256 in microservices because…
options: Public verify keys can be shared; private signing key stays in the issuer
quiz.explanation: Avoid distributing a symmetric secret everywhere.

quiz.question: mTLS proves…
options: Service identity via certificates on both sides

problems.title: Secure an Endpoint
problems.prompt: POST /transfer moves money. List security controls you require before production.
problems.solution: AuthN (JWT/session), AuthZ (own accounts only), input validation, HTTPS, rate limit, idempotency key, audit log, fraud checks, CSRF if cookie-based.

problems.title: Secret Leak Response
problems.prompt: An AWS key was committed to GitHub. Immediate steps?
problems.solution: Revoke/rotate key immediately; check CloudTrail for abuse; remove from git history; add secret scanning; educate the team.

problems.title: Token design
problems.prompt: List 5 validations your API must perform on an access JWT.
problems.solution: Verify signature with JWKS; check exp; iss; aud; required scopes/roles for the route.

problems.title: Flow choice
problems.prompt: Internal cron calls billing API with no user. Which OAuth flow?
problems.solution: Client Credentials grant (or mTLS + workload identity).
